mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TWORK_INFO_ILBHS A INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IVAT B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.IVATKEY = B.IVATKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IB_DT G ON A.CTKEY = G.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = G.OWKEY AND A.IBHDKEY = G.IBHDKEY AND A.IBDTKEY = G.IBDTKEY WHERE 1=1 AND COALESCE(A.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N'
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
